mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sales_order (order_id, order_year, order_month, order_seq, customer_id, customer_name, material_id, material_name, spec_model, sales_qty, unit_price, total_amount, delivery_requirement, order_date, applicant, approval_status, remark) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{orderYear}, #{orderMonth}, #{orderSeq}, #{customerId}, #{customerName}, #{materialId}, #{materialName}, #{specModel}, #{salesQty}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalAmount}, #{deliveryRequirement}, #{orderDate}, #{applicant}, '0', #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE sales_order SET approval_status = #{status}, approver = #{approver}, approval_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(order_seq) FROM sales_order WHERE order_year = #{year} AND order_month = #{month}
SELECT * FROM sales_order WHERE approval_status = #{status} ORDER BY order_date DESC
